name: rocky
description: rocky Claude Code plugin (Bun runtime). 7 openapi_* tools (cache-first OpenAPI / Swagger spec inspection, endpoint search, tag list) + seo_validate (OG / Twitter Card / JSON-LD / favicon meta validation via ogpeek) + notion_* tools (cache-first Notion page read + refresh diff, delegated to the ntn CLI, registered only when ntn is detected) + journal_* tools (append-only local JSONL agent journal — the record layer; always registered). Slash commands: /finish (gh CLI), /curate (distills the journal into a configured wiki location — the organize layer). Bundled skill: writing-cc-plugin (Claude Code plugin authoring guide + reference). PR watching is delegated to Claude Code's built-in /autofix-pr. Archived domains (mysql / spec-pact / pr-watch tools) re-enter as separate PRs.
